codeReview.summary: The fix commit 2cf050e adequately addresses the prior failure by making `.github/workflows/ci.yml` truthful again: CI now has one lint step, one static-check step, one typecheck step, one tests step, and one build step with matching commands. Reviewing both the earlier workflow-fix attempt and the fix transcript/diff shows the remaining failure was specifically duplicated or mislabeled CI validation steps, and this fix resolves that issue without introducing new contradictions in the file it changed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The prior failed review was driven by stale repository state after an earlier reviewer looked before later README and workflow-cleanup fixes landed, not by a defect in commit 2cf050e itself. For fix reviews, shared guidance should emphasize checking the full sequence of later docs-platform fixes before carrying forward earlier blocking findings against a narrowly scoped workflow-truthfulness patch.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Prior review file flagged README and `.env.example` issues against this feature, but those concerns were subsequently addressed by later commit `c4ed757` (README repair) and the separate workflow-truthfulness cleanup feature `docs-platform-workflow-truthfulness-cleanup`. Commit `2cf050e` changes only `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, and current truth sources show the CI labels now match the commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The transcript shows a reliable Windows command pattern using `pnpm -C <repo> ...` and PowerShell healthchecks that is not captured in mission shared state. Recording that pattern would reduce future trial-and-error on Windows agents.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session `d8fa56f8-474e-410c-8cb9-ef62002d5571` successfully used `pnpm -C "C:\Users\bendc\Documents\GitHub\Leagueback-WEBAPP" run lint`, `... test`, `... run build`, and a PowerShell `Invoke-WebRequest` healthcheck on port 3005 after earlier sessions struggled with command invocation.

summary: Reviewed the fix handoff, fix transcript skeleton, prior failed review, and both relevant diffs. The original failure centered on duplicated and mislabeled CI validation step names; commit `2cf050e` cleanly fixes that by restoring truthful unique step labels in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, so this fix review passes.
